name: XMax Inc.
business: XMax Inc. designs and distributes contemporary residential and commercial furniture through wholesale, retail, and online channels worldwide. Its family of brands includes Nova LifeStyle, Diamond Sofa, and Nova Living. Customers primarily include designers, distributors, and retailers serving mid-level and high-end private label home furnishings.

exposures.sentence: In March 2026, the Board of Directors of the Company approved a strategic expansion into artificial intelligence (AI) while continuing to operate and develop its existing furniture business.

Our planned investments and expansion into AI software and hardware development, cloud and GPU computing infrastructure, AI model access and orchestration, and enterprise-focused AI agent deployment involve significant risks and uncertainties that could adversely affect our business, financial condition, results of operations, and cash flows.

The Fund will use the Subscription Amount to subscribe approximately 6.667% interest of certain fund that holds an aggregate of 353,772 shares of Common Stock of Space Exploration Technologies Corp., a Texas corporation (SpaceX), comprising of 121,805 shares of Class A Common Stock and 231,967 shares of Class C Common Stock of Space X.
Cybersecurity incidents could disrupt business operations, result in the loss of critical and confidential information and adversely impact our reputation and results of operations.

catalysts.event: Incorporated XMax AI Inc. in Nevada
catalysts.sentence: On April 1, 2026, the Company incorporated XMax AI Inc. in the State of Nevada.

catalysts.event: Entered into AI Inference Platform Deployment and Service Agreement with Cloud Alliance Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On April 6, 2026, XMax AI Inc. (XMax AI) entered into an AI Inference Platform Deployment and Service Agreement (the Agreement) with Cloud Alliance Inc. (the Service Provider), effective as of April 1, 2026.

catalysts.event: Nova BVI subscribed 99.815% interest in Preamble Capital for $5,664,500
catalysts.sentence: On September 25, 2025, Nova BVI closed its subscription of 99.815% interest in Preamble Capital, A Series of CGF2021 LLC (the Preamble Capital), a Delaware Limited Liability Company for $5,664,500.

catalysts.event: Xmax Alpha subscribed 99.82% interest in Preamble Capital I for $5,605,000
catalysts.sentence: On October 15, 2025, Xmax Alpha Holdings Ltd. (the Xmax Alpha), a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands and an indirectly wholly owned subsidiary of Xmax Inc. entered into a Subscription Agreement (the Agreement) with Preamble Capital I, A Series of CGF2021 LLC (the Fund), a Delaware Limited Liability Company.

catalysts.event: Filed Certificate of Change to increase authorized shares to 5,000,000,000
catalysts.sentence: On November 3, 2025, the Company filed a Certificate of Change (the Share Increase Amendment) with the Secretary of State for the State of Nevada to amend its Articles of Incorporation to increase the amount of authorized shares of its common stock, par value $0.001 per share, from 250,000,000 shares to 5,000,000,000 shares.

catalysts.event: Filed Certificate of Amendment to change company name to XMax Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On November 3, 2025, the Company filed a Certificate of Amendment (the Name Change Amendment) with the Secretary of State for the State of Nevada to amend its Articles of Incorporation to change the Company s name from Nova LifeStyle, Inc. to XMax Inc.
